brief_notes: Presents the same multiplicative vs additive comparison but tables are markedly less informative. Model comparison table uses qualitative 'Better Model' and 'Significance' columns instead of exact R-squared values. Population vector table uses 'Accurate/Reduced/Preserved' instead of directional error degrees. PCA-LDA results are described narratively without the per-direction classification accuracy table. The discussion and introduction are well-written. Cross-subject replication is noted but without delta-R-squared values.
